deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K, est value $266K. Close date May 1, 2026.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development. Isaac interested in mobile home project (half units displaced veterans, half profit). Offer ~$150K contingent on project moving forward. Title defect: Deed #20100079485 incomplete legal description. Correction Deed in progress with Van Hutchins.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Present Isaacs $150K offer formally. Pull listing agreement to verify signatories.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up with prior buyers. Isaac expanded concept to 10-acre lots. Josh LT potential partner - connect Isaac + LT.
Jennifer Ball (co-owner) took initiative - hired attorney Van Hutchins, pulled county records. Title defect confirmed. Correction Deed in progress.
Chris updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaacs mobile home development interest. Sisters enthusiastic. Isaac partner Adam also interested.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan, underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. 208 DOM, vacant 6 months. Double-carrying cost ~$5,300/month. Presented three paths: short sale, VA assumption, price reduction with cash to close. Sellers chose to move back in.
deals.next: Confirm signed termination release received from sellers.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back into property to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when ready. Termination release sent for signatures.
Call completed 11am. Chandler laid off - strong hardship documentation. Sellers leaning toward short sale. Appreciate honest approach.
Where Things Stand email sent. Full market analysis presented. Option 3 highlighted: drop to $518,999. Payoff confirmed $489,501 as of 3/13/26.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC, June deadline (high urgency). List price $259,900. Payoff ~$170K-$192K. Potential hairline crack in foundation. Insurance adjuster completed roof inspection May 11, claim moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm updated payoff letter before closing. Monitor showings. Follow up on roof/fascia decision.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. Kept conversation open. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. Canvassed neighborhood - neighbors friendly, distributed flyers. First showing feedback: cultural concern about street direction, not enough sqft. Roof/insurance update shared.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG Photography (43 photos + floorplans). Going live May 13.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate cash sale $152,000. Lien blocker resolved April 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Cleared and funded April 26, officially closed April 27, 2026.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket + rug + trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel + Michael (notary) + UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded. Commission pending confirmation.
Lien release picked up from Michael (notary). Fernando Castillo signed. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 4.05 acres, 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft. Divorce motivation, need to sell. Payoff ~$257K (est. May 2026). Recommended list price $295,000. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10-mile radius. Net proceeds: $14,700 at $295K list.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Schedule professional photos. Discuss Colton contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17, 2026. CMA pulled (thin market). Built listing presentation with interactive net sheet.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property (A-735 S-46 E L TAYLOR). Under contract with Espinoza buyers via agent Javier. List price reduced to $117,500. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier for third party financing update.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email address.

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family, agent Javier. Amendment sent for third party financing update. EMD not yet received. Backup offer interest noted.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in: Conex, camper, feeders.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.contact: Priority Bank (Kelly, Jerry Sadler, Ray Stidham)
deals.notes: Bank-owned property, cleanup in progress. Floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrical and plumber, new drywall on site. Utilities: Medina Electric Coop (866-632-3532) and East Medina County SUD (830-709-3879). Police reports pending.
deals.next: Call utility companies directly. Replace camera batteries. Police report follow-up. Submit listing agreement to Priority Bank (Jerry Sadler + Ray Stidham).

logs.m: Police reports stalled. Utility companies no response. Camera needs batteries. Listing agreement still not submitted to bank.
Cleanup active. Floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed. Email sent to Kelly with utility info. Transformer number to grab on-site.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney (HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodelers) dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: New construction Lennar home in Grace Gardens. Rental listing arrangement discussed but never executed. Owner decided to proceed without listing agreement. Ended professionally on good terms.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo with acknowledgment that payment received. Relationship intact - closed clean.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden group. Grief healing through plants story. Real estate potential - trust-based, long-term relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story on social media.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Investor with Linares Capital LLC. Buy box partially known - development deals (mobile home projects, 10-acre subdivisions). Multiple deals in pipeline together.
leads.next: Continue collaboration on active deals. Explore additional wholesale opportunities.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St, plans to sell soon. Property 90% complete, having trouble finishing. Already working with realtor but open to pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Check in on finishing progress. Offer to promote to buyer network. Stay connected through garden community.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her recently passed. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Probate/inherited property - son may want to sell or rent.
leads.next: Get son name and contact info from Miss Pat. Reach out with gardening connection angle. Assess situation sensitively.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 property (dumpster contractor). Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase home.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info next time on site. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work - unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property they want. Understand financing and work scope.

priorities.title: Confirm 340 Sollock Termination
priorities.notes: Listing terminated May 29. Termination release sent for signatures. Need to confirm signed release received from both sellers.

followUps.text: Email/text Matt and Chandler - confirm receipt of termination release

priorities.title: Call Priority Bank Utilities
priorities.notes: Medina Electric Coop (866-632-3532) and East Medina County SUD (830-709-3879) have not responded. Need transformer number to submit Medina Electric application for new meter.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric - confirm new meter install status and get transformer number
Call EMCSUD - confirm water service setup

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path - Second Look Buyers
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers came back - property is their favorite. Offered pre-inspection report. Todays 2pm showing rescheduled to May 30. Hottest lead on property.

followUps.text: Confirm tomorrow showing time (May 30) with agent
Follow up with buyers agent after showing - check for movement

priorities.title: Tilden 20ac - EMD + Amendment
priorities.notes: Under contract with Espinoza buyers. EMD not received yet. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier for third party financing update. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email correct.

followUps.text: Follow up with Javier - confirm EMD received and signed amendment returned
Verify Mrs. Espinoza email (Rosieespinoza1962@tmail.com - check domain)

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Listing Prep
priorities.notes: New listing - 4.05 acres, divorce motivation. Recommended list $295K. Need updated payoff letter, professional photos, listing agreement signed. Also discuss contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Discuss 181 CR 7751 contractor work with Colton
